series_metadata.series_title: Uniform Accounting Network Internal Development Manual
series_metadata.series_description: Contains information and descriptions of developmental changes to UAN software.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system or application data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system or application data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format, then destroy, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
